cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the question. It's asking which of the following is true about Wu Jinyou based on the given article. First, I'll go through the article to find the relevant information. The article mentions Wu Jinyou as "the head of the Polar Research Institute of China and the group's leader." His statement is quoted as, "I hope the students have not only a field trip to the Yellow River station, but are also touched by the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers here. I also expect in the future, some of them will choose to devote themselves to polar research and maybe even work with us." Now let's check each option: (A) He is a graduate from Dalian Marinetime University. The article does not mention anything about Wu Jinyou's educational background or where he studied. So this is not supported by the text. (B) He is the president of Dalian Marinetime University. Again, the article does not state that he is the president or any position at Dalian Marinetime University. Zheng Li is a student from that university, but Wu Jinyou's position is with the Polar Research Institute of China. (C) He thinks highly of the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers. This is supported by the article. Wu Jinyou explicitly mentions that he hopes the students are touched by the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers. This implies he thinks highly of them.
